_doc: CIM topology A = Metis Alpha (Aetina, pre-production M.2). NO on-card DRAM; LLM-INCAPABLE (closed-firmware -1301 wall). Carries the TRANSPORT/ENVELOPE differences only; the CIM COMPUTE engine (M1, simulator/models/params/m1_cim.json) is topology-agnostic and SHARED with topology B. PCIe Gen3x4 3.9 GB/s + 911 us per-call DMA floor are MEASURED. alloc envelope ~14 MB is an ASSUMPTION (vs 1 GiB BAR). alloc_envelope_param_count (6M, SDK weight-alloc limit) != native_max_kn (4.19M K*N area, m1_cim.json).
honesty: calibrated compute (Alpha 13 pts) + measured transport; envelope=assumption

notes.param_vs_kn: alloc_envelope_param_count (6M params, SDK alloc limit) is NOT native_max_kn (4.19M = 2048x2048 K*N tile area). Different quantities.
notes.envelope: ~14 MB is an assumption (vs the 1 GiB IOMMU BAR), not a measurement.
notes.llm: closed firmware -1301 + no on-card DRAM -> cannot compute LLM; used for CIM/PCIe/NPU/GPU/CPU micro-benchmarks.
notes.clock: 800 MHz (machines.md); same as Card -> direct dev_lat/dev_gflops comparison, no rescale.

provenance.per_call_floor_us: Phase 0.3 pcie_floor_A1d5 911 us per-call DMA floor [measured]
